title: DuckDuckGo Proxy Browser
description: An unblocked search interface and proxy hub to access external game assets securely without firewall limits.
controls: Type search queries. Used to bypass standard router filters to find mirror game directories.

title: Fortnite Cloud Ingress
description: Access fully featured action battlefield runs via the high-performance Xbox Cloud remote gaming portal.
controls: Keyboard WASD + Space to jump, mouse to target and harvest resources.

title: Roblox Web Playgate
description: Join millions of user generated open worlds and casual minigames directly through unblocked cloud services.
controls: Left Click to navigate menus, computer arrows/WASD to control your customized avatar blocks.

title: Frenzy Web Arcade
description: Dozens of fast-paced arcade challenges, physical sports matches, and spatial puzzles.
controls: Mouse triggers or Spacebar depending on the active game selected.

title: VaperV2 Emulator (Vapes V2 Client)
description: A high-performance custom Minecraft emulator client designed to bypass firewall rules with low ping rates.
controls: WASD keys to run around, Left click to mine/place classic inventory blocks.

title: Slope Run Ultimate (2026 Spec)
description: The viral neon aesthetic physics roller challenge. Accelerate down randomly shifting vertical green grids.
controls: Left / Right Arrow keys or A/D to tilt your glowing laser ball left and right.

title: Retro Bowl (2026 Unblocked Edition)
description: Manage your favorite gridiron franchise, call strategic plays, and throw perfect touchdowns in retro 8-bit style.
controls: Click and drag to aim passes, release to fire the ball. Spacebar or cursor keys to dodge defenders.
